CustomField.formula: pro_Project_Manager_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Project_Lead_Physical_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Project_Lead_Records_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Physical_Aircraft_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Aircraft_Records_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Engine_On_Wing_Support_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Engineering_Support_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Cabin_Inspection_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_New_A_C_Support_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_BFE_Support_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Material_Support_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Non_Project_Support_Days_Budgeted__c + pro_Other_Days_Budgeted__c
CustomField.label: Total Days Budgeted
